idea-plugin.name: Context Combiner
idea-plugin.description:
Boost your AI coding workflow with ContextCombiner!

ContextCombiner is a productivity tool designed to help developers quickly gather code context for Large Language Models (LLMs) like ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, or GitHub Copilot.

Instead of manually copying and pasting multiple files, simply right-click a folder and export everything in a structured format.

Key Features:

  • 🚀 Easy Context Gathering: Right-click any file or folder in the Project View to start.
  • 🌲 Interactive Selection: Select or deselect specific files using a convenient tree view with checkboxes.
  • 📝 LLM-Friendly Format: content is automatically wrapped in Markdown code blocks (```) with clear file headers (### path/to/file), making it easy for AI to parse.
  • 🛡️ Smart Filtering: Automatically ignores:
    • Hidden files (starting with dot)
    • Binary files (images, compiled archives)
    • Files ignored by Git (respects .gitignore via IDE VCS integration)

How to use:

  1. Right-click a folder or file in the Project View.
  2. Select "Copy Context for LLM...".
  3. Review the file list in the dialog and uncheck any unnecessary files.
  4. Click OK — the formatted context is now in your clipboard, ready to paste!

action.description: Select files and copy their content to clipboard

idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.2

  • Added per-file size and estimated token count in the selection tree.
  • Added a live selection summary with selected file count, total size, and approximate token usage.
  • Added Expand all and Collapse all actions for faster navigation in large trees.
  • Made the root item visible in the popup to provide better folder context.
  • Changed hidden and Git-ignored file behavior: they are now shown in the tree but unchecked by default instead of being fully hidden.
  • Added a notification after copying context to the clipboard, including the number of exported files.
  • Registered a dedicated notification group and bumped the plugin version from 1.0.1 to 1.0.2.
